summary: Created integration gate test suite and executed against live Neon. All 4 scenarios PASS plus 3 enforcement verifications PASS. Verdict: GO.

scenarios.name: Happy path — full pipeline
scenarios.detail: URL active, field updated ($99/mo → $149/mo), check_log written, all 7 gates simulated

scenarios.name: Rate limit — orchestrator stops at Gate 2
scenarios.detail: Rate state shows 60/60 requests — orchestrator would block at Gate 2

scenarios.name: Parser missing — FIELD_ABSENT at Gate 4
scenarios.detail: No KV parser entry for example-test.com::price — parser would return FIELD_ABSENT

scenarios.name: CTB trigger enforcement
scenarios.detail: CTB trigger correctly blocked PROMOTED→DRAFT demotion

post_build_prerequisites: ADR: Register Field Monitor in SNAP_ON_TOOLBOX.yaml as TOOL-FM-001 (Tier 0)
ADR: Document field_monitor schema ownership in REPO_DOMAIN_SPEC or equivalent
Doppler: Add FIELD_MONITOR_DATABASE_URL and FIELD_MONITOR_ORCHESTRATOR_URL secrets
Cloudflare: Create KV namespaces for PARSER_KV and EGRESS_KV
Cloudflare: Deploy all 4 workers via wrangler deploy
